suppressions.reason: Architecture plugin is intentionally centralized so all custom oxlint rules are loaded as one JS plugin.
Current pnpm audit reports transitive ws moderate advisory; note and avoid dependency upgrades until compatibility is reviewed.
getAuthOptions is pure Better Auth config construction; structurally required to assemble all plugin options in one call.
Well-known alias handlers follow identical audience-load plus auth-handler pattern by design; each alias resolves a different pathname.
Route map entries are structurally identical contract records listing name/method/path/source; duplication is intentional documentation.
Plugin endpoint handlers follow identical pattern: findOne, check NOT_FOUND, assert access, update/delete, invalidate cache. Structural similarity is intentional in BA plugin endpoints.
Auth schema is generated/maintained as the single Better Auth and plugin table contract; splitting it would create schema drift.
OAuth scope catalog Better Auth endpoints are intentionally explicit and mirror resource-server plugin endpoint shape: validate, authorize, mutate through BA adapter, invalidate cache.
Create/update payload builders for scope and grant rows intentionally share timestamp and actor-stamping structure while preserving explicit row types.
vite is imported in configuration and resolved through transitive monorepo dependencies.
_styles import is required to load global css while complying with oxlint unassigned-import rules.
Comment explains the cross-reference design contract of OAuth query parameters.
False positive on getpass prompt text; no password or secret value is hardcoded.
